title: shathah #8354
definition:
1) to drink
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to drink
             1a1a) of drinking cup of God's wrath, of slaughter, of
                   wicked deeds (fig)
        1a2) to feast
    1b) (Niphal) to be drunk
